introSection: Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, USA. It was built by Miler Manufacturing and has an oval layout.
fullText:
Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, USA. It was built by Miler Manufacturing and has an oval layout.



Unpainted track and supports.
